briefdescription.para: Output length in bytes for SLH-DSA-SHAKE-256s.
Total signature length in bytes for SLH-DSA-SHAKE-256s.
Maximum length of Data1 buffer in bytes (for WOTS+ chain values)
Maximum length of Data2 buffer in bytes (for hash outputs and base conversions)
Maximum length of Data3 buffer in bytes (for single hash outputs)
Maximum length of Data4 buffer in words (for storing digits)
Number of invalid signature invocations allowed.
Length of checksum input in digits for WOTS+.
This function returns the XSecure_SlhdsaInstance instance.

para.verbatim: SlhdsaInstance stores all required components for SLH-DSA signature verification.

listitem.para: SLH-DSA-SHAKE-256s (see FIPS 205 Table 2) Formula calculations: n=32, lgw=4, len1=ceil(8*32/4)=64, len2=3, len=67

briefdescription.para: This file contains structures, constants and declarations used in SLH-DSA instance management and provides interface to SLH-DSA verification operations.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
5.7 tvp 02/19/26 Initial release
